ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the customer (0: Female, 1: Male) */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region where the customer resides */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "married" INTEGER /* Marital status of the customer (0: Unmarried, 1: Married) */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children the customer has */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education of the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "preferred_communication_channel" TEXT /* Preferred communication channel of the customer */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer owning the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., Checking, Savings, Mortgage) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Closed) */,
  "account_opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was opened */,
  "account_closing_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was closed (if applicable) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate associated with the account */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction on the account */,
  "average_balance" REAL /* Average balance in the account over a specified period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., Deposit, Withdrawal, Transfer) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount involved in the activity */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the transaction */,
  "transaction_category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (e.g., online, offline, ATM) */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., debit, credit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_activities_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of financial product (e.g., Loan, Credit Card, Investment) */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the financial product */,
  "product_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions associated with the financial product */,
  "product_fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the financial product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_products" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial product */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer-product relationship (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "product_application_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer applied for the financial product */,
  "product_approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial product was approved (if applicable) */,
  "product_rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejecting the financial product (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Customer, Bank Employee, Administrator) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., customer, bank employee, administrator) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_history" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged in */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date of the login event */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time of the login event */,
  "login_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "login_device" TEXT /* Device used by the user to log in */,
  "login_location" TEXT /* Location from which the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scores" (
  "credit_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score record */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer associated with the credit score */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "credit_score_date" TEXT /* Date when the credit score was last updated */,
  "credit_agency" TEXT /* Name of the credit agency providing the credit score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_score_id")
)
